description: You are a Clinical Data Manager overseeing the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). Using the OpenClinica system (login: root / Admin123!), correct a data entry error where 'Week 4 Follow-up' data was misassigned. Invalidate the 'Week 4 Follow-up' event for subject DM-101. For subject DM-102, schedule a 'Week 4 Follow-up' event for today's date and record the following Vital Signs: Systolic Blood Pressure (142), Diastolic Blood Pressure (88), Heart Rate (76), Body Temperature (37.1 C), and Weight (85.0 kg). Ensure the data is saved and marked as complete.
